ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Self reported indicator of taking an opioid pain medication in the past 7 days
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Nausea
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Vomiting
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Constipation
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Difficulty passing urine
Notes: 0 = No difficulty passing urine; 10 = Extreme difficulty passing urine

ElementDescription: Opioid side effect past 7 days - Difficulty concentrating
Notes: 0 = No difficulty concentrating; 10 = Extreme difficulty concentrating

ElementDescription: Opioid side effect past 7 days - Drowsiness
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Dizziness
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Confusion
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Fatigue
Notes: 0 = Not fatigued at all; 10 = Extremely fatigued

ElementDescription: Opioid side effect past 7 days - Itchiness
Opioid side effect past 7 days - Dry mouth
Notes: 0 = No dry mouth; 10 = Extreme dry mouth

ElementDescription: Opioid side effect past 7 days - Headache
Urge to use opioid pain medication over past 7 days
Opioid effects in past 7 days
Notes: 0 = I felt/feel no effect from the drug(s) at all; 1 = I think I felt/feel a mild effect, but I'm not sure; 2 = I definitely felt/feel an effect, but it is not really strong; 3 = I felt/feel a strong effect; 4 = I felt/feel a very strong effect

ElementDescription: Extent of liking or disliking effects of opioids taken in past 7 days
Notes: 0 = Dislike a lot; 50 = Neutral; 100 = Like a lot

ElementDescription: Extent of wanting to take opioids that were taken in past 7 days if given the opportunity in the future
Notes: 0 = Definitely would not; 50 = Neutral (Don't care); 100 = Definitely would

ElementDescription: Feeling moody after taking opioids in past 7 days
Feeling itchy after taking opioids in past 7 days
I would be happy all the time if I felt as I felt then
I felt more excited than dreamy
My memory seemed sharper than usual
